title: Fake Plastic Trees
why_this_song: Fake Plastic Trees by Radiohead (1995) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "It wears her out"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Her green plastic watering can"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "For her fake Chinese rubber plant"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "For her fake Chinese rubber plant"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "She looks like the real thing"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wears" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wears" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "plastic" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "plastic" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But I can't help the feeling

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: For her fake Chinese rubber plant
If I just turn and run

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Fake Plastic Trees" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Fake Plastic Trees" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Fake Plastic Trees", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Fake Plastic Trees", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Fake Plastic Trees" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Fake Plastic Trees" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
